free_text: Excitation functions for the production of 18F and
24Na from Al and Si with fast pions
LEP (low energy pion channel) and P
(particle and pion physics channel) of LAMPF.
The pion intensities ranged from 4x10**5 to 5x10**8
irradiated for a period of 40 min (two half-lives of
No details on sources of uncertainties.
The targets for this study consisted of packets of
3.8-cm diam circular disks of Pilot B plastic
Pilot B plastic contains 91.6% carbon by weight.
These cross sections are not corrected for the 3.1%
electron capture branch, but are based on the
assumption that 18F decays 100% by positron emission.
The targets for this study consisted of packets of
3.8-cm diam circular disks of Pilot B plastic

elemental silicon (0.05 or 0.10 cm thick) or quartz
(SiO2, 0.1 cm thick). Pilot B plastic contains 91.6%
